subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort is located in Jodhpur?
question_hi: जोधपुर में कौन कई स्तर की भूमिकाओं के संगत एक मंत्रालय है।
explanation_en:
Mehrangarh Fort is a famous fort located in Jodhpur, serving as a museum and a tourist attraction.
Mehrangarh Fort was built in the 16th century by Rao Jodha and has a rich history and cultural significance.
